textByHash.006dfe6596c5ec28ead2be4f8e2306827433dc34: Well, I was planning on continuing my hobby of wandering up and down this bit of coastline, bellowing random threats and throwing bottles.
textByHash.028dc0c46242a076752c9b6f0f7e14f80784a2b6: Aye! The mudskippers! Huge they were! Ten feet of glistening, muddy flesh floppin' towards me with white foam flying from their gnashing fangs!
textByHash.035aa795b9d07f3781316c8eb8341526e9df1e5f: Go south to Mudskipper Point and lob a Fishing Explosive into the sea. You can grab them from the Slayer masters.
textByHash.076dec8dfa110f8927f38dfaf87bda0ea240ec1b: If you don't feel like lobbing a net about all day you can use them to fish with...
textByHash.17b07c9728acb90d9ead90dc9ffe150db6043a63: For more information, speak to Nigel in the Lumbridge graveyard. You may choose where to begin - where would you like to start?
textByHash.1d5bac4d13b841d79f7a15c957fc404d14a8531b: Just lately the Council wants to let people skip the Tutorial, so - ha ha ha - they dump the job on Skippy. Bah!
textByHash.22d71a9efbb9b515eb080be30cd36e48896b8b40: I wish you wouldn't go looking for them. Those vicious killers will tear you apart.
textByHash.26fd07c8e145d26cd816c17852ca40f028f00d24: So, anyway, do you want to skip the Tutorial?
textByHash.284abf7a461cac93011bd964ba10f45d6bdd37f2: Give me strength...Here's what you do. Pay attention!
textByHash.2acd7a9efa51afbdc397e0db9edccff54733c2b5: Well, Slayer Masters sell these highly volatile potions for killing underwater creatures.
textByHash.2b0ac4d5b7eb54d70220e8716ffa1547ff4bd92a: Then bring it here and I will drink it.
textByHash.2c69863694fad45141c8980b6b3e36c05516a59a: Owwowwoww... must remember not to shout...
textByHash.30571eb7d0cd447e16e5b5b32cbb60b59a24c450: My name's Skippy. Normally I live down by Rimmington.
textByHash.308b341e4884bd4a8556df0cf47724c2e7c77373: I was ambushed by them way back, see. They got the drop on me...I can't remember where, somewhere around here though.
textByHash.32555dc6141d8f649e49e720019db950716171e1: Ahhhhhhhhhhgh! That's cold! Are you trying to kill me?
textByHash.357f3dbe83f8e3449d673266dc4c548264336401: And don't throw it at me!
textByHash.3655454354940b9708abd51d7163df34eebbe040: Excellent! I was thinking I was going to freeze out here!
textByHash.368c04da561acb1925b25ed9d5ac90521e10ca75: Look, I do know a hangover cure. If you can get me a bucket of the stuff I think I'll be ok.
textByHash.397dbcab8c1d61f2a20f956b107b151f81ac754e: It's the extra sheep tranquilizers that gives it that added kick!
textByHash.430c84cebff9536fa6570e2a80eb9dc21bb2f6ec: Aye, Mudskippers! Those ferocious, ravening, evil, beady-eyed terrors of the deep!
textByHash.43a6e3d172432218e59b0c006acec77f824910d2: What it was, infact, was a...
textByHash.44b16745c08308da90bc16900ce020568837a45d: When you arrive on the mainland you will be a Deadman. If you die when skulled, or if you are killed by another Deadman you will lose the most valuable items from your bank.
textByHash.45bfe5ea533301f0d835883b6e53ff076a430bab: Yeah? Yeah? Well when THEY come floppin' into your house and eat your furniture you'll be sorry!
textByHash.498b6f779964eff65d56e88e9950c62615783776: I am now going to teleport you to Kourend Castle where your journey in the Twisted League will begin. Once you arrive, the Leagues Tutor will fill you in on how the Twisted League works. Good luck!
textByHash.4a7a8f476dfed22334abd08e607b5b2d925bdb63: That or it's something to do with that time with the dress and the field full of daisies...
textByHash.4ead53d93a4485914e351cf4406d4f1c1ebbb6c0: Do you wanna skip the Tutorial?
textByHash.4f25aa184bc3cde05596a4faf58fa3677e8c4aa9: No you don't! You think I'm crazy, like all the rest! Well, if I'm crazy, how did I get these?
textByHash.57875619f1c8c16fb688b0c3cc6a3643648e0816: Add the chocolate powder to the milk, then add the snape grass.
textByHash.587d8d6108d4906f6eb9bff96ec0e26110364ea0: Although I guess you won't be able to get to Rimmington on this League world...
textByHash.58ec5c7c1807d3c95a73f717dc2803cc29462800: Nettle for preference. Just make sure it's hot.
textByHash.5f256598c4bbccc2be072f1d9ea89385a53441cd: Inc'hearnt? Inc'herant! You...you...with yer fancy book- lernin' words. You'd be more than inc'herant if youd seen...
textByHash.6610856a0c22d97c53f8c0bb819fa53dd35d828f: Are you likely to remember that or should I go get some crayons and draw you a picture?
textByHash.672ad752d284a03a67f260a4a41ceb03b4fceed9: Sure. You'll find me all over this island. Ask me again any time you like.
textByHash.6782443d2ab7f5306b779cc88cae33202cf6141f: I was fishing using a Fishing Explosive...
textByHash.67c30e4995aacd1a2b37be5cb7defd8c5b7d76e0: You take a bucket of milk, a bar of chocolate and some snape grass.
textByHash.69076150d01af18432a1d97775f20d9000bb6451: I think it may have something to do with my near- constant raving about mudskippers.
textByHash.69f38899a67fbf5e7fee23b3a477d3fba216156d: No. But I could do with a bowl of tea to warm myself up a bit. Go grab me one and we'll talk.
textByHash.69fa3037f8812d52c615856fbc1243849423b444: They are the reason I've lost everything, except the horrifying memory of what THEY look like...
textByHash.6a27091bf4af45a4a48330c4870f33362f5a9046: You'll have a job. I've been drinking this for a week.
textByHash.6ed05dd4d6f573bc9cf844836a2ac5e0b66a0463: I can't remember... I've been drinking to forget the horror, and all I seem to have forgotten is where it all happened...
textByHash.74ce0fc5d0f489d67943484390e0473baf4be033: They hunt giant mudskippers by wearing their skins and swimming close until they can attack them.
textByHash.7904b6801055739d75658cabd05fcf382522f356: Egad! Don't you know not to shout around a guy with a hangover?
textByHash.855f95b8206640cdf4eda642408d42813eb4bad8: To help you get started, you'll have 12 hours of immunity before anyone can attack you. Speak to the Doomsayer in Lumbridge to waive your immunity and get on with the killing!
textByHash.87676bc9a3716b1e7725033484e9957d692b4371: Shut yer' word-hole and listen! I can't remember all the details, as I'm sure they must have hit me quite hard, but the last thing I remember before it all went black...
textByHash.8a3ccf6382e96a6ef8bac1a292ffaee95a9ed091: Grind the chocolate with a mortar and pestle.
textByHash.8ed5b5f87565c246b1901ac19336b369a88e0c31: So what are you here for then?
textByHash.984dad5e05221502039992367355d0388704ed6f: Grind the chocolate with a pestle and mortar.
textByHash.a8cd1d90e6bbdaec84ec0e743c9fb2394ef4139a: They! Those bloodthirsty, flesh-tearing devils! They are the reason I'm out here every day hurlin' bottles into the sea!
textByHash.a99e9ec4fada905db7256dbb4e2a03b1d4a3ad10: I fought them up and down the beach, with the tide rising and more of them leaping towards me with cutlasses drawn!
textByHash.ac79941f50f930cad5881274da792c4e7972520e: Not so loud...I think I have a hangover...
textByHash.b328f08b3623f2a92dfb82203ad5a8386ef4a94e: Right on. I'll read you the official messages first, then send you on your way. Ahem...
textByHash.bf76d4177596408ec3991aa3c7af7341b0c56e27: A bucket of milk with chocolate ground into it, with a handful of snape grass thrown in on top.
textByHash.c7cc7bc78717da9447ceff3f934d016ef9c2f95f: A Mogre is a type of Ogre that spends most of its time underwater.
textByHash.d51f0bfb0786d693ebc118966269c1372763a7bf: Good choice. Let me know if you change your mind.
textByHash.d81e6f45c969ff6cac9329430a0bef4bd6873c51: My name's Skippy. Normally I live down by Rimmington. You should come and see me when you're passing.
textByHash.d8931d313009d9dd523b9095e3faca79621de334: ...was one of those devils rearing over me, its eyes glowin' red with the fires of hell!
textByHash.dde84ce91ad5f17da2e91458d6796e5da90373e8: My addiction to almost-lethal alcohol did that.
textByHash.de3e55d9c0483e609bb9e093da377d9260df97ca: But this time I was startled by what I thought was a giant mudskipper.
textByHash.de64193f52713499bfe8ca9a17183ed0d833bfd4: The end, and we all live happily ever after. Got it?
textByHash.ebc98ececb6a1d16b96b015c156f6467e6a48581: Thanks! Now I have two right boots!
textByHash.ed1b2bb2e1ebbb199b74cbf0a086eeddf245a665: When I used the Fishing Explosive I scared off all the fish, and so the Mogre got out of the water to express its extreme displeasure.
textByHash.ee5b815ab8ed557be89793b61ed151befc77236b: It's all becoming clear to me now...
textByHash.f164fb2256fbfb7a21166553cae4bf485969bc7e: Take a bucket of milk, a bar of chocolate and some snape grass.
textByHash.f3ca9cce9a41e0e8b1d1d4bfeddaea86786f3ad3: Well, I'm still wet, still cold and still waiting on that nettle tea.
textByHash.fc73b57e1d6a0261befeee2e187bccfc3cc62fcb: But if you are set on finding these Mogres just head south from here until you find Mudskipper Point.
